rationale: Gov't Code §2306.114 governs filing of an agency's annual budget with the governor and legislature. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Copies of the annual budget certified by the presiding officer of the board shall be filed promptly with the governor and the legislature.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed change; rule concerns budget filing procedure, not homestead exemptions.
